title: Contains Duplicate
notes: Use a hash set to track visited values.

title: Valid Anagram
notes: Count character occurrences using a frequency map or array.

title: Product of Array Except Self
notes: Calculate prefix and suffix products in two sweeps, or with space optimization.

title: Maximum Subarray
notes: Use Kadane's Algorithm: update current max sum and global max sum at each step.

title: 3Sum
notes: Sort the array. Loop first pointer, then use two pointers for remaining target.
